name: School Time Taxi
districts_or_customers: Spring/north Houston, TX area private families and schools; not a contracted yellow-bus school district operator
recent_news: Facebook page created 2024 ('School Time Taxi | Spring TX') suggests a recently launched micro-operator; no M&A or growth news found.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit tuck-in: appears to be a 1-2 vehicle private kid-taxi/shuttle service in a market already served by Taxi Mom, HopSkipDrive and EverDriven, not a school district contractor with a bus fleet.

name: Glenn Mc Guire School Bus
districts_or_customers: Likely a Harford County Public Schools contractor route operator (Bel Air, MD area); customer base not publicly confirmed.
recent_news: Yelp listing marks the business as CLOSED (verified August 2025); no successor or sale announcement located.
fit_notes: Not a viable tuck-in: business appears closed per Yelp, and even when operating it was a single owner-operator route contractor of negligible scale relative to Summit's platform.

name: Right Way School Bus Co
owner_or_parent: Horizon Inc. (DBA Right Way School Bus Co.)
principals: James Brown (listed President per source data)
districts_or_customers: Victorville / High Desert (San Bernardino County) CA area; specific district contracts not publicly disclosed.
recent_news: FMCSA shows active passenger carrier registration since June 2015 under Horizon Inc., DBA Right Way School Bus Co., DOT #2701837; 3 power units, 2 drivers, 0 CDL holders reported - very small footprint.
fit_notes: Marginal tuck-in: legitimate FMCSA-registered school bus carrier but only ~3 vehicles and 2 drivers; sub-scale for Summit unless bolted on as a route add in the High Desert market.

name: W & M School Bus LLC
districts_or_customers: Revere / North Shore Greater Boston area; no specific district contracts publicly identified; not in MART vendor list reviewed.
recent_news: No M&A, sale, growth or safety news located; no website or social presence found; not surfaced in MassDOT 2025 passenger carrier export under this exact name.
fit_notes: Unlikely tuck-in: appears to be a micro-LLC registered to a residential address in Revere with no visible district contracts or fleet scale; MA market is heavily served by NRT, Connolly, and other established platforms.

name: Foster's School Trnsprtn LLC

recent_news: No website, no news, no M&A or sale activity located; registered to a residential/PO-box style address (Common Brook Rd, suite 404) in Owings Mills.
fit_notes: Unlikely tuck-in: appears to be a 1-2 person LLC at a mailbox-style address with no public operational footprint, well below Summit's typical acquisition threshold.
